topic_text: When Every year on from Date & Time, do Blink lights using Philips Hue. Rocking New Years - January 01 at 12:00 AM, then blink All lights. Make your HUE lights ring in the new year.
When Every year on from Date & Time, do Blink lights using Philips Hue. Rocking New Years - January 01 at 12:00 AM, then blink All lights. Make your HUE lights ring in the new year.
When Every day at from Date & Time, do Breathe lights using LIFX. Christmas 2. Christmas 10pm red green
When Every day at from Date & Time, do Breathe lights using LIFX. Flash green and red for Christmas. Flashes LIFX bulbs green and red for Christmas
When Every day at from Date & Time, do Breathe lights using LIFX. Get ready for Sleep! Breathe Reminder at 11pm Daily.. Get ready for Sleep! Breathe Reminder at 11pm Daily.
When Every day at from Date & Time, do Breathe lights using LIFX. It's Almost 420 Alarm.
When Every day of the week at from Date & Time, do Breathe lights using LIFX. Breathe my Lifx light at 11:30AM. Every Day at 11:30 AM Breathe my Lifx light

When Every year on from Date & Time, do Set a zone temperature using Honeywell evohome. Advance timer for Evohome. The Evohome app lets you override the scheduled target temperature, but only immediatelyThis recipe lets you set a timer to do this at a point in the futureYou can't set this trigger on IFTTT as a one-off, so I have used a trigger that repeats annuallyTo stop it repeating, you just need to delete the recipe (or change when it is set for) in the 364 days after it has triggered.

When Door or window is opened from Wireless Tag, do Turn thermostat off using Netatmo Thermostat. WirelessTags turn off Netatmo. - used for airbnb apartments ( during winter season )- whenever  someone is opening a window for a given timeperiode ( let's say 15min) the Netatmo Thermostat will be turned off. - thats how you can safe a lot of energy!

When Exit an area from BMW Labs, do Turn light off using Hive Active Light. When I leave home, turn the light off. Make sure the light is off when you leave home. This Applet will turn off the light when you leave the area you've specified with your car.
When You enter an area from Location, do Blink lights using LIFX. Flash lights to let others know your almost home. Will let people at home know your almost home by flashing the lights

When You enter an area from Location, do Breathe lights using LIFX. Flash your LIFX bulbs when you're nearly home to let your family know. Adjust the area with the map as desiredWhen you enter the zone, your LIFX bulbs will flash the selected color.

When You enter an area from Location, do Run a HomeSeer system event using HomeSeer. iPhone(iOS) Homeseer Geofence: If You enter an area, then run a HomeSeer system event. iPhone(iOS) Homeseer Geofence

When You enter an area from Location, do Run a HomeSeer system event using HomeSeer. iPhone Enters Geofence - Homeseer: If You enter an area, then run a HS system Coming Home event. Lights and AC come on when I'm coming homeHomeseer Occupied State.

When You enter an area from Location, do Run a HomeSeer system event using HomeSeer. If you arrive home, run a HomeSeer system event to unlock door, turn on lights and set thermostat. This event uses the location trigger set to your home and then runs a HomeSeer event to unlock your door, turn on your lights and set your thermostat to a comfortable level.

When You exit an area from Location, do Run a HomeSeer system event using HomeSeer. If I leave home, run a HomeSeer event to lock my doors, shut off my lights and adjust my thermostat. This recipe runs a HomeSeer event to lock your doors, turn off your lights and set your thermostat back when your android device leaves home

When End of cycle from GE Appliances Washer, do Blink lights using Philips Hue. At the end of a cycle, blink all lights. Make sure you know when your GE Appliances washer cycle is over, by blinking your Hue lights.

When Open door alarm from GE Appliances Refrigerator, do Change color using Philips Hue. If door alarm is triggered, set my Hue lights to red. Use this recipe to change your Hue lights to red, warning you that your fridge door alarm has triggered, and you really should go close it! Protect your food!

When You enter an area from Location, do Beep using PAVLOK. If I'm near my favorite fast food restaurant beep my Pavlok loudly. Pavlok lets you know you shouldn't be at that fast food restaurant with a loud beep

When You enter an area from Location, do Send a command using openHAB. Turn Presence on when entering  your home area. Send an ON command to presence item every time you enter a certain location areaCan be used for presence detection and automating certain things when you leave your house.

When You exit an area from Location, do Send a command using openHAB. Turn Presence off when leaving  your home area. Send an OFF command to presence item every time you exit a certain location areaCan be used for presence detection and automating certain things when you leave your house.

When Ask for a sports team's next game from Amazon Alexa, do Quick add event using Google Calendar. Add your team's games to your Google calendar. Whenever you ask Alexa when your team is playing this recipe automatically adds that game to your Google calendar.Note: this has a default of 3 hours for the game, you can change that if you want to watch the post-game show as well.

When Ask for a sports team's score from Amazon Alexa, do Quick add event using Google Calendar. Next Sports Game. When you ask Alexa the score, a calendar event is created for the next time that team plays.

When Ask for a sports team's score from Amazon Alexa, do Quick add event using Google Calendar. Next sports game. When you ask the score of a game, a calendar event will be created for the next scheduled game
When Item added to your Shopping List from Amazon Alexa, do Quick add event using Google Calendar. Alexa shopping list to Google Calendar. Alexa shopping list to Google Calendar
When Item added to your To Do List from Amazon Alexa, do Quick add event using Google Calendar. Add To Do Items To My Google Calendar. Add Item To Google Calendar
When Item added to your To Do List from Amazon Alexa, do Quick add event using Google Calendar. Add To Do List Item To Google Calendar. Add To Do List Item To Google Calendar

When Item added to your To Do List from Amazon Alexa, do Quick add event using Google Calendar. Amazon Alexa To Do List items added to Google Calendar for IOS or Android.. This recipe will add your Alexa To Do List items to your Google Calendar Just tell it which calendar when setting up.

When A specific person has been seen from Netatmo Security, do Start activity using Harmony. Start playing the favorite song of the person arriving home. Launch Harmony Music when someone specific arrives home

When Current pollen count rises above from Weather Underground, do Lock using SmartThings. Close your window if there is a high level of pollen.. To avoid allergy inducing pollen to enter your home, trigger this recipe every time there is a high level of pollen.
When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Pause using ThermoSmart. Natural warming. Used for a home with living room on sunny side with big glass windows
When Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground, do Pause using ThermoSmart. Stop heating when its warm outside. No need to turn on the heater when it's warm outside
When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Unpause using ThermoSmart. Unpause Thermosmart when cloudy. When cloudy unpause thermosmart
When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Unpause using ThermoSmart. Unpause ThermoSmart if outside temperature drops below pre-set value.. Fill in the outside temperature..

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Unpause using ThermoSmart. Resume the ThermoSmart after sunset. Turn off the heater during the summerdays then start the heater program during those "warm" dutch summernights

When Ask for a sports team's next game from Amazon Alexa, do Quick add event using Google Calendar. Ask Alexa for a Sports Team's next game, add it to Google Calendar. Ask Alexa for a Sports Team's next game and then add it to Google Calendar

When Ask for a sports team's next game from Amazon Alexa, do Quick add event using Google Calendar. Your Team's Upcoming Game. Ask Alexa when your favorite teams next game is and have the information and opponent added to your GCal.

When Ask for a sports team's next game from Amazon Alexa, do Quick add event using Google Calendar. Add Your Next Team's Game To Your Google Calendar. If you ask Alexa when a sports team play next, it will add it to your google calendar.

When Ask for a sports team's next game from Amazon Alexa, do Quick add event using Google Calendar. Sports game added to calendar. When you ask for the next time a team plays, it will be added to your google calendar
When You enter an area from Location, do Turn on fan for 15 minutes using Nest Thermostat. Turn on Nest when I get near home. Set the area around your home
When You exit an area from Location, do Enable a quick action using Honeywell evohome. If  you exit an area turn on quick action. IF Location exits an area  THEN  turn on quick action (away)

When Say a specific phrase from Amazon Alexa, do Dim lights using Philips Hue. Lights Normal. Use this to Turn back Lights normal after you had Dim'd
When Say a specific phrase from Amazon Alexa, do Dim lights using Philips Hue. Sexy time. Use voice command "Sexy time" to dim lights and put you in the mood

When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Snooze using RainMachine. If current condition changes to rain, then snooze device for 1 day. If current condition changes to rain, then snooze device for 1 day
When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Snooze using RainMachine. CA Drought Compliance. Snoozes rainmachine for 48 hours if rain is detected.
When Tomorrow's forecast calls for from Weather Underground, do Snooze using RainMachine. Forecasted rain. Sprinkler will not run if rain is forecasted.
When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Stop all watering using RainMachine. Stop watering if it begins to rain. Stop Rainmachine sprinklers if it begins to rain

When Wind speed rises above from Weather Underground, do Activate siren/strobe using SmartThings. If a Haboob is coming, strobe my SmartThings Aeon Siren. Haboobs are natural dust storms which are common during the monsoon season in Arizona Get notified before they arrive at your doorstep!

When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Lock using SmartThings. Close your window if it starts raining.. Every time it starts to rain, a fenestra window will be triggered to close.
When Timelapse of the day from BloomSky Weather, do Blink lights using Philips Hue. Timelapse of the day, blink hue light.. Timelapse of the day, blink hue light.
When A person has been seen outside from Netatmo Security, do Change color using Philips Hue. Let me know when someone is at my doorstep. Hue lights will turn blue when Presence detects someone
When A vehicle has been seen outside from Netatmo Security, do Change color using Philips Hue. Get the lights red when a car is seen outside. Alert me when a car is approaching
When A specific person has been seen from Netatmo Security, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. Turn on lights when a specific person is detected. A nice welcoming action !

When New song played from Amazon Alexa, do Dim lights using Philips Hue. Dim the lights when you play music on Echo. Dims the lights to specified value when you play music  Does not apply to Pandora, podcasts and sample clips.

When Say a specific phrase from Amazon Alexa, do Dim lights using Philips Hue. If You say "Alexa trigger normal lighting", then dim lights to 100% brightness. For bundled voice-activation recipes, including other voice products and services, visit www.saymosaic.com

When A specific person arrives home from Netatmo Security, do Turn off using D-Link Smart Plug. If ... arrives home, then turn off D-Link Smart Plug.. If ... arrives home, then turn off D-Link Smart Plug.
When A specific person has been seen from Netatmo Security, do Turn off using D-Link Smart Plug. If ... is seen, then turn off D-Link Smart Plug.. If ... is seen, then turn off D-Link Smart Plug.

When A specific person arrives home from Netatmo Security, do Turn on using D-Link Smart Plug. If ... arrives home, then turn on D-Link Smart Plug.. If ... arrives home, then turn on D-Link Smart Plug.
When A specific person has been seen from Netatmo Security, do Turn on using D-Link Smart Plug. If .... is seen, then turn on D-Link Smart Plug.. If .... is seen, then turn on D-Link Smart Plug.

When A person has been seen outside from Netatmo Security, do Lock door using Danalock. Make sure the door is locked when Presence sees someone outside. Lock the door when Presence detects somebody outside your home

When Button press from Button widget, do Enable/Disable Econo mode using Daikin Online Controller. Enable Econo mode on my Daikin AC unit.. Enable Econo mode to save the environment as well as your energy budget!
When Button press from Button widget, do Enable/Disable Holiday mode using Daikin Online Controller. Enable Holiday mode on my Daikin AC unit.. Enable Holiday mode on your Daikin AC units!

When Button press from Button widget, do Enable/Disable Holiday mode using Daikin Online Controller. I'm on vacation, enable Holiday mode.. Enable Holiday mode on your Daikin AC unitsEnjoy your vacation without having to worry about schedule timers or running units.
When Press bttn from Bttn, do Preheat oven using Home Connect Oven. Press bttn to preheat your oven. Press your bttn to preheat your oven with Home Connect to a preferred temperature.

When Driving started from BMW Labs, do Activate siren/strobe using SmartThings. When your BMW starts, alert with SmartThings Siren!. It's quite handy to activate the siren when your BMW starts during odd hours in the night! It could be someone trying to break-into your car.The scenario can be expanded to switch on your driveway lights etc using a custom scenario defined in SmartThings!
When You exit an area from Location, do Turn lights off using LIFX. Turn lights off when leaving home. When exiting a geofence around your house, all LIFX bulbs will turn off.

When Say a specific phrase from Amazon Alexa, do Dim lights using Philips Hue. If You say "Alexa trigger dim lights", then dim lights. For bundled voice-activation recipes, including other voice products and services, visit www.saymosaic.com

When Say a specific phrase from Amazon Alexa, do Dim lights using Philips Hue. If You say "Alexa trigger back to normal", then change brightness to 100%#backtonormal. For bundled voice-activation recipes, including other voice products and services, visit www.saymosaic.com
When Say a specific phrase from Amazon Alexa, do Dim lights using Philips Hue. set lights to 10%. set lights to 10%

When Any new check-in from Foursquare, do Log an event using UP by Jawbone. Let my team on Jawbone UP know what I'm UP to (get it?). Automatically post your foursquare checkins to your UP stream as events.
When Any new check-in from Foursquare, do Log an event using UP by Jawbone. Foursquare checkin to UP. Foursquare checkin to UP
When Any new check-in from Foursquare, do Log an event using UP by Jawbone. Foursquare to Jawbone. Foursquare to Jawbone.

When New check-in at category from Foursquare, do Log an event using UP by Jawbone. Share gym check-ins to your Jawbone UP feed. Automatically post your gym sessions to Jawbone Up by checking in on Foursquare or Swarm.
When New check-in at category from Foursquare, do Log an event using UP by Jawbone. Tell my team when I'm at the gym.. Check in at the gym, and this Applet will send it to your feed.
When Button press from Button widget, do Stop all watering using RainMachine. Stop all watering on RainMachine. This DO button will stop all current watering cycles on your RainMachine.

When Button press from Button widget, do Create calendar item using Office 365 Calendar. Add an event for dinner tonight at 6PM. This DO Button Recipe creates a calendar event to get dinner at the current location.
When You exit an area from Location, do Turn lights off using LIFX. Fade lights off (when leaving location). When outside specified range set lights to fade until fully off.

When Presence no longer detected from SmartThings, do Turn off lights using Philips Hue. Lights off when leaving home. I often leave the lights on in the house when I go outThis way when I head out the door the lights will automatically shut off :)
When Switched on from SmartThings, do Turn on color loop using Philips Hue. Turn on a light to color loop. Trigger a hue lamp you just turned on to color loop.

When Switched off from SmartThings, do Call a function using Particle. Arm Legacy House Alarm when SmartThings is Away. Arm Legacy House Alarm when SmartThings is Away Find writeup here:https://www.hackster.io/tasi/automate-legacy-home-alarm-system-96f235

When Switched on from SmartThings, do Call a function using Particle. Disarm Legacy House Alarm when SmartThings is Away.. Arm Legacy House Alarm when SmartThings is Away Find writeup here:https://www.hackster.io/tasi/automate-legacy-home-alarm-system-96f235
When Presence detected from SmartThings, do Disarm location using Homeboy. Disarm Homeboy with Smartthings when I get home.. Disarm Homeboy using Smartthings Arrival Senser.

When Someone known has been seen from Netatmo Security, do Blink lights using Philips Hue. Blink led when known person seen. Blink Philips Hue Led when someone known has been registered with Netatmo Welcom ecamera

When Someone known arrives home from Netatmo Security, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. Turn on the lights when someone known arrives home. Welcome each person that you know and that arrives home by turning on lights.

When Button press from Button widget, do Extend tumble using GE Appliances Dryer. Extend your dryer tumble. Let's say you're at the grocery store and you realize that your dryer cycle isn't done yet, and it's going to be another 10 minutes before you get home and by then all the clothes are going to be wrinkled! No worries, press your Extend Tumble buttonAvoid the wrinkle.

When Button press from Button widget, do Send message to a circle using Life360. Message your Life360 circle:  "Ready for pickup!". Let the rest of your family know that you're ready to be picked up! This Recipe uses the Life360 service, a way for families to easily keep in touch.
When Say a specific phrase from Amazon Alexa, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. tell Alexa to close blinds. "Alexa, close the blinds"
When Button press from Button widget, do Start Dry Mode using tado Air Conditioning. Start your AC's dry mode. This will activate your AC's dry modeEnjoy!
When Button press from Button widget, do Start Fan Mode using tado Air Conditioning. Start your AC's fan mode. This will activate your AC's fan modeEnjoy!
When Button press from Button widget, do Start a program using RainMachine. Start a program on RainMachine. Start a specific watering cycle on your RainMachine.
